name: Subnautica Tracker
description: Tracks Subnautica camera + underwater/vehicle state for accurate spatial audio. Detects when you're in a base, Seamoth, Cyclops, or Exosuit to gate the underwater filter, and enables the radio filter when you're in a vehicle or Cyclops.
author: twofault

disclaimer.title: Crash on menu load
disclaimer.body: Subnautica crashes when loading from the main menu into the game. Only attach this bridge once you're already in-game.
